hero.title: Prepare smarter. Interview better.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.description: The content you enter is used exclusively for the analysis and is not stored permanently. Please do not enter confidential information or personal data that you would not want to share with an AI service.

password.label: Demo Password
password.tooltip: This demo is password protected to prevent misuse and unnecessary API costs. The password is only used to unlock the analysis.

about.title: About Prepwise
about.subtitle: A portfolio project built to demonstrate Next.js, TypeScript, and AI integration skills — and to solve a real problem I faced during my own job search.
about.whyText: During my own job search as a Frontend Developer, I kept running into the same problem: you seemingly check every box on a job posting on paper, and still don't get invited to interview. Knowing whether you're a good fit isn't enough; what matters is understanding exactly where the gaps are and how to prepare for them. Prepwise solves exactly that. Using AI, it analyzes your resume and a job posting and shows you concretely where you stand and what to prepare for, so you walk into the interview better prepared.
about.feature1Description: AI-powered evaluation of how well your profile fits the role — with a concrete percentage and summary.
about.feature2Description: Identification of missing skills and your strengths compared directly against the job posting.
about.feature3Description: Personalised recommendations on what to study or prepare before the interview.
about.feature4Description: Likely questions you might face in the interview — with tips on how to answer them best.
about.bio: Frontend Developer with a passion for clean, user-friendly products. Currently open to new opportunities, feel free to reach out!
